description_long: This is an above-ground, octagonal jacuzzi with a wooden exterior paneling and a bright blue inner lining. The jacuzzi features a set of wooden steps on one side for easy access, and a metal ladder on the opposite side for entry and exit. An external filtration or pump system, colored orange and black, is connected to the jacuzzi, indicating water circulation and maintenance functionality. The interior is spacious, with smooth, high walls and no visible seating or molded contours. The water level appears to be empty, revealing the full depth and clean blue surface of the interior. The overall design is robust and suitable for outdoor placement in urban environments such as backyards, patios, or communal spaces.
description: An octagonal, above-ground jacuzzi with wooden paneling, blue interior, access steps, a metal ladder, and an external pump system. The jacuzzi is empty and designed for outdoor use.
description_view_0: This view shows the jacuzzi from the side with the wooden steps and the external pump system clearly visible, along with the blue interior.
description_view_1: This view highlights the metal ladder inside the jacuzzi and provides a direct look at the pump system attached to the side.
description_view_2: This side view displays the length of the jacuzzi, the blue interior, and the pump system on the left, with the metal ladder visible on the far side.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the side with the wooden steps leading up to the jacuzzi, showing the open blue interior and the absence of the pump system on this side.
